Speed killed quality.
We fixed that.

The Problem

The catalog as it is for your team.

For most e-commerce teams, keeping product content fresh at scale is a constant battle between speed, quality, and consistency. Manual writing takes too long. Generic AI produces off-brand copy.

Learn more
The Solution

Content that knows your products.

Performative combines your product data, brand guidelines, tone of voice, and SEO logic to generate catalogue-accurate content that converts — at enterprise scale.

See how it works

✦ Capabilities

Everything content.
Nothing else.

PDP Generation

Turns raw product data into compelling, conversion-optimised descriptions.

SEO Content Engine

Category pages, blogs, and meta data that rank in search engines.

Brand Voice Training

Fine-tune the AI with your brand, so it always finds the perfect tone.

Personalization

Dynamic content based on segment, location, or customer behaviour.

Multi-CMS Integration

Native connectors for Shopify, Magento, Shopware, and more.

Locally Hosted

Your data stays on your infrastructure. GDPR-ready by design.

✦ How It Works

Built for both ends of the market

Four steps from raw catalog data to published, optimised content.

Connect

Integrate with your PIM, PMS or product database in minutes.

Configure

Set your brand voice, SEO targets, and output structure.

Generate

Bulk-generate catalog-accurate content variants at scale.

Publish

Review, approve, and push — or automate — to your storefront.
